   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
    "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, confusion_matrix\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier\n",
    "import numpy as np"
   ]
  },

   "id": "5c7b402b",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [

  {
   "cell_type": "code",

   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "y = df['species']"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "ee728893",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "x = df.drop(columns='species')"
   ]
  },

  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "edb0cfc6",

   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "0    setosa\n",
       "1    setosa\n",

      ]
     },

   "source": [

   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 15,
   "id": "cfb21079",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "x_train, x_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(x, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=42)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 23,
   "id": "490590e6",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Accuracy with 10 trees: 1.0\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "rf_default = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=10, random_state=42)\n",
    "rf_default.fit(x_train, y_train)\n",
    "y_pred_default = rf_default.predict(x_test)\n",
    "default_accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred_default)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Accuracy with 10 trees:\", default_accuracy)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 24,
   "id": "0acd8243",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "tree_range = range(1, 101)  \n",
    "scores = []\n",
    "\n",
    "for n in tree_range:\n",
    "    rf = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=n, random_state=42)\n",
    "    rf.fit(x_train, y_train)\n",
    "    y_pred = rf.predict(x_test)\n",
    "    scores.append(accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 27,
   "id": "8678c77a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\n",
      "Best Accuracy: 1.0\n",
      "Best number of trees: 1\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "best_n = tree_range[np.argmax(scores)]\n",
    "best_score = max(scores)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nBest Accuracy:\", best_score)\n",
    "print(\"Best number of trees:\", best_n)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 28,
   "id": "a167a21e",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
    "plt.plot(tree_range, scores, marker='o')\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Number of Trees (n_estimators)\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Accuracy\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"Random Forest Accuracy vs Number of Trees\")\n",
    "plt.grid()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
